title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it is time for Mejiro Dober's race against
Air Groove—a necessary battle in her journey to
forge a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober asks if I still believe in her strength.
I tell her that my faith in her has never changed
since the day we met. With that, I see her off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to look away. This is the moment
Mejiro Dober will transcend herself and forge a
new Mejiro legacy!
